subject: A figure in white and red patterned attire surfs or slides through fire and lava on a volcanic landscape, arms raised, surrounded by curving fire trails
description: A humanoid figure moves across a volcanic terrain in a low surfing stance, wearing a white garment with geometric red markings — circles and stripes prominently visible. Their arms are raised outward and upward, and arcing loops of fire surround the body in sweeping curves. The ground beneath is dark volcanic rock and glowing lava. A massive eruption or fire wall fills the background with deep orange and amber. The figure's expression is joyful or exhilarated. The art is energetic with strong motion in the fire arcs and a painterly, warm palette dominated by oranges, reds, and whites.
foreground: figure in surfing stance with fire arcs on lava rock
background: volcanic eruption, lava flows, fire wall
